variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the best above-EBIT overhead buckets: Employee benefits and Other operating expenses. Did not add Administrative Expenses, Other personnel expenses, or stock-based compensation separately because they appear to be subcomponents of the broader selected buckets. Did not add Research & Development Expense to XSGA because the 2024 detail suggests it is embedded within Other operating expenses, so adding it would risk double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

Added Net Financing Income/Expense from the full preview as a fallback because 2025 appears to report only a broader net financing line and the candidate list misses that label.
